hero.subcopy: Curated luxury pieces awaiting their next chapter. Authenticated. Certified. From Tokyo.

philosophy.headline: From Japan to the World, Delivering Authenticity.
philosophy.authentic_desc: Verified by expert staff, one by one. Every item guaranteed genuine.
philosophy.curated_desc: Only the finest condition items make it to our shelves.
philosophy.certified_desc: AI authentication by Entrupy — world standard precision.
philosophy.ceo_message: Our commitment is to deliver only authentic items. Every product comes with an Authenticity Guarantee — 100% refund if ever found inauthentic. We serve customers worldwide with trust, transparency, and care.

live.label: LIVE SELLERS WANTED
live.headline: Sell Japan's Finest to the World.
live.subcopy: No inventory. No risk. You just focus on streaming.
live.step1_desc: No follower count required. Beginners welcome.
live.step2_desc: Full equipment & support provided by T-Family.
live.step3_desc: High-ticket sales to global luxury buyers.
live.benefit1: All products are prepared and managed by T-Family. No purchasing, sourcing, or storage needed. Absolutely zero inventory risk.
live.benefit2: Handle guaranteed-authentic luxury brands including CHANEL / HERMÈS / LOUIS VUITTON.
live.benefit3: Filming, lighting, connectivity, product descriptions, and pricing support — all handled by T-Family.
live.benefit4: All complaints, returns, and trouble are handled for you. Sellers just talk, showcase, and build their fanbase.
live.benefit5: Live streaming for high-net-worth international buyers. One session can generate premium-level sales.
live.benefit6: No follower requirement. No experience needed. Part-time OK. Many sellers start their very first live stream with T-Family.
live.worry2: Worried about trouble with high-value items
live.worry3: Have followers but can't turn them into sales
live.worry4: Want to try live selling but lack confidence
live.worry_answer: T-Family takes care of all those worries for you.
live.official_desc: Sellers who meet certain criteria are certified as T-Family Official Live Sellers. Earn the official title, priority live slots, and opportunities to join international streams — a program that elevates your status as a seller.
live.closing: T-Family doesn't just 'use' sellers. We sell together, grow together, and win globally as a team.

authenticity.label: WHY TRUST US
authenticity.headline: Guaranteed Authentic, Every Time.
authenticity.entrupy_desc: All branded items handled by T-Family undergo authentication and certification by Entrupy, a world leader in AI authentication technology. Using advanced image analysis and proprietary algorithms, we deliver highly accurate authenticity verification, ensuring quality and peace of mind for every customer.
authenticity.guarantee_desc: Every item we carry has passed strict standards and is guaranteed authentic. In the unlikely event an item is determined to be inauthentic, we promise a full refund — no questions asked.
authenticity.expert_desc: Our experienced specialists meticulously inspect every item one by one. The condition is so good, you'd question if it's truly pre-owned. We curate only the finest quality pieces.
authenticity.cert_desc: Products accompanied by an Entrupy certificate come with an official document featuring a unique verification link for each item, objectively confirming its authenticity. T-Family maintains a world-standard authentication system.
authenticity.store_desc: See and feel our products in person before purchasing. Our expert staff is ready to answer any questions and address any concerns with care.
authenticity.online_desc: For customers who cannot visit in person, our online shop maintains the same rigorous standards for managing and selling every item.
authenticity.transparent_desc: We clearly present product condition, pricing, and terms of sale, creating an environment where customers can purchase with full confidence.
authenticity.license: Antique Dealer License: Tokyo Metropolitan Public Safety Commission No. 301132115776

reviews.label: CUSTOMER REVIEWS
reviews.headline: Google Reviews
reviews.review1: Outstanding quality. Everything is authentic and I felt safe purchasing. International shipping was fast too.
reviews.review2: The best vintage luxury shop in Tokyo. Staff is very professional, and the Entrupy certificate gives extra peace of mind.
reviews.review3: Purchased a CHANEL bag. Excellent condition with authenticity certificate. Very satisfied and will shop again.
reviews.review4: Ordered from overseas and received it quickly via DHL. Beautiful packaging and perfect product quality.

greeting.label: MESSAGE FROM THE CEO
greeting.headline: Greeting
greeting.name: Tominaga Asaki
greeting.title:
T-Family Inc.
Representative Director
greeting.message:
I am Tominaga Asaki, Representative Director of T-Family Inc. Above all, we are committed to creating an environment where both Japanese and international customers can shop with complete confidence.

In addition to verification by our experienced expert staff, we utilize highly trusted external authentication services to ensure that only genuine products reach our customers. Every item comes with an Authenticity Guarantee, and in the unlikely event an item is confirmed counterfeit, we respond with a full refund in good faith.

Whether you are a domestic or international customer, and whether this is your first time shopping with us, we strive to provide clear explanations, prompt service, and secure packaging. We will continue to deliver Japan's finest products and value to the world, guided by the principles of trust, transparency, and care.

b2b.label: FOR BUYERS & DEALERS
b2b.headline: Partnership
b2b.subcopy: We offer wholesale distribution of carefully curated, pre-owned luxury brand goods to domestic and international dealers and buyers. Our inventory focuses on high-demand brands including CHANEL / HERMÈS / LOUIS VUITTON / GUCCI, popular in overseas markets.
b2b.feature1_desc: Every item is fully authenticated. Condition grades are clearly stated (photo and video previews available). Full refund guarantee if any issue arises.
b2b.feature2_desc: Fair and competitive wholesale pricing informed by market trends. Domestic inventory enables fast shipping turnaround.
b2b.feature3_desc: International shipping via DHL. Invoice and export documentation available. Sourcing consultations for cross-border EC and live selling also welcome.
b2b.feature4_desc: Leveraging our track record in international live streaming and EC sales, we also provide recommendations on best-selling items and optimal price ranges.
b2b.target_title: Trusted by These Types of Businesses
b2b.target1: Buyers selling Japanese brands to overseas markets
b2b.target2: EC site and live commerce operators
b2b.target3: Physical retail and pop-up store operators
b2b.target4: Corporations seeking a reliable sourcing partner
b2b.deal_info: We work with corporations and sole proprietors alike. Preferential terms for ongoing partnerships and bulk orders. Small-lot inquiries are also welcome.
